---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV · Arpan Acharya"
toc: false
---

My full curriculum vitae is embedded below. You can also
[**download the PDF**](files/Arpan_Acharya_CV.pdf){target="_blank"}.

::: {.cv-embed}
<object data="files/Arpan_Acharya_CV.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900px">
  <p>
    Your browser doesn't support inline PDFs.
    You can <a href="files/Arpan_Acharya_CV.pdf" target="_blank">download the CV here</a>.
  </p>
</object>
:::

<div class="cv-download">
  <a class="btn btn-primary" href="files/Arpan_Acharya_CV.pdf" download>
    Download CV (PDF)
  </a>
</div>
